title: Caldera - Data Collection from Network Shared Drive (Windows)
description: Detects bulk file collection from UNC/admin share paths on Windows systems. Caldera T1039 emulation copies or moves files from mapped network drives and UNC paths to a local staging directory before exfiltration. Patterns include xcopy, robocopy, and PowerShell Copy-Item with remote share source paths.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (( ('Process Name' like '*\\xcopy.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*\\\\*') or ('Process Name' like '*\\robocopy.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*\\\\*') or (('Command Line' like '*copy \\\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*xcopy \\\\*')) or (('Command Line' like '*Copy-Item \\\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*cp \\\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-ChildItem \\\\*')) ) and (('Command Line' like '*C:\\Temp*' or 'Command Line' like '*C:\\Users\\Public*' or 'Command Line' like '*C:\\ProgramData*' or 'Command Line' like '*%TEMP%*' or 'Command Line' like '*%TMP%*')))
falsepositives: Authorized backup procedures reading from network shares
Migration scripts copying data between shares
Software deployment pulling packages from file servers
